text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: We're finally ready to give racing a try!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Attention! Before participating in a race,
be sure to always check your skills!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Take this! Allow me to grant you some
skill points for this special occasion!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Skill points can be acquired at various
times during your Career playthrough!
